description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated elderly man with a serene expression, wearing a turban and draped garment. The figure sits cross-legged on a rectangular base adorned with swirling patterns that resemble stylized clouds or waves. His hands rest gently in his lap, with fingers forming a meditative gesture. The facial features are detailed, showing a prominent nose, smiling mouth, and defined cheekbones, while the beard and mustache add to the character's wise appearance. The back of the sculpture reveals the draped fabric cascading down, with folds and creases adding realism. The entire piece is rendered in a weathered, light-colored stone, giving it an ancient and dignified presence.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a seated elderly man with a turban, draped garment, and serene expression, resting on a decorated base. The figure exudes wisdom and tranquility, with intricate facial features and textured clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, turban, draped garment, and hands resting in his lap, with the ornate base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the layered folds of the garment, as well as the side of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, turban, and the draped garment flowing down the back, with the base's rear edge visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and garment folds, mirroring the left side but with subtle differences in texture and wear.
attribute_subject_matter: seated elderly human figure with turban and draped garment
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
